titleStmt.title: SII 23.101: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 101. (A.R. No. 101 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the north wall of the Goddess shrine Mār. Kulaśēkhara: year 20

summary.p: It is not clear whether this Kulaśēkhara could be identical with Kulaśēkhara whose accession took place in A.D. 1268, as his claim to the conquest ‘of all countries’ is not found here. It registers a gift of some land by one Adigaimānār Kulaśēkhara for the formation of a flower garden named after him, in common to the temples of Nālāyira Īśvaramuḍaiyār and Nilaiyuḍaiya-Pāṉdīśvaramuḍaiyār (at Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi) in Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. Among the boundaries to this gift garden are mentioned a tirunandavanam and a tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam belonging to the temple of Nālāyira-Viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ in the same village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
niyokappaṭikku svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiribhuvaṉa śrīkula ceka
radevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10vatu Irācarācacaturvemaṅkala ṉār nālāyirayi
śvaramuṭaiyārum nilaiyuṭaiya pāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiyāruṅ koyilil śrīru �ṇṭārāṉa Ātikai
māṉār kulacekaraṉ tirunantavaṉamāka ceyvikkiṟa paṟṟukku perunāṉ kellai peruvaḻikku meṟkku
m teṉ(n)ellai kallaṭaikkuṟucci nālāyiraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiru nanta �ṟṟukku kiḻakkum
vaṭaellai nālāyiraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku teṟkkum le tiruccūlakal
kkaḷum nāṭṭi cantirātittapakal variniṅkallāka kallilum cempilum ve laiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai ti
rukkaṭavū rāttā ṉeḻuttu Ivai kuṇṭūr śrīkṛṣṇaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai pāṭakattu govin
taśarmmaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai kurovi (śa)śatukkanārāyaṇaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai niṉa ttuṟaic comāci yeḻuttu
Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu kecavaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai karunallūr yiḷaṉāyak kaṉ ṉe ṉeḻuttu Ivai yemappeṟūr
nārāyaṇaṉ ṉeḻuttu Itu vinniyokappaṭi kallil veṭṭiṉeṉ Ivūrkku �maḻakiya taccaṉ ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
